chunks.title: Job's Repentance and Confession
chunks.reason: A complete speech where Job acknowledges God's sovereignty and repents for speaking without full understanding.

chunks.title: God Rebukes the Friends and Restores Job
chunks.reason: A narrative unit where God addresses Eliphaz, instructs the friends to sacrifice, and restores Job's fortunes.

chunks.title: Job's Restoration and Final Days
chunks.reason: A narrative account of the community's comfort, Job's doubled wealth, his daughters, and his peaceful death.
